stats.fact: Claude Code Max 5x plan provides ~88,000 tokens per 5-hour rolling window (5x Pro's ~17,600 token limit)
Claude Code Max 20x plan provides ~220,000 tokens per 5-hour rolling window
Average Claude Code user costs ~$6/developer/day; 90% stay under $12/day, projecting to $100-200/month for full-time use
Power users report saving up to 93% with Max subscription vs raw API billing; one developer's peak month would have cost $5,623 at API rates vs ~$200/month Max
Claude Code hit 1 million searches in March 2026, up 20x year-over-year; generates ~$2.5B in annualized revenue
Teams using Claude Code report 2-3x productivity improvements on large-scale refactoring and testing
Claude Code most loved developer rating is 46% vs Cursor 19% and GitHub Copilot 9% in 2026
Anthropic doubled Claude Code 5-hour usage limits for Pro, Max, Team and Enterprise plans in May 2026 via SpaceX compute deal
Max 20x costs only 10x more than Pro for 20x the usage, making per-message cost half that of Pro or Max 5x
Claude Code agentic loops consume 10x to 100x more tokens than typical chat interactions due to multi-step read/write/test cycles
